sections.heading: Introduction
paragraphs: This Refund & Cancellation Policy applies to memberships and related payments made through Superfowl Food Club, operated by Finfreedompreneurs Club Pvt. Ltd.
By purchasing a membership or using paid services available on the platform, users agree to the terms outlined below.

sections.heading: Membership Payments
paragraphs: Membership fees paid through the platform are processed using authorized payment methods available within the application or associated official channels.
Users are advised to review membership details, validity, pricing, and applicable terms carefully before completing any payment.

sections.heading: Refund Eligibility
paragraphs: Refund requests may be considered only under the following circumstances:
points: Failed transactions where payment was deducted but membership was not activated
Incorrect payment processing due to technical error
Unauthorized transactions verified by the company after review
Payment-related technical issues attributable to the platform
after_points: All refund requests are subject to verification and approval by Finfreedompreneurs Club Pvt. Ltd.

sections.heading: Non-Refundable Situations
paragraphs: Refunds may not be provided in cases including, but not limited to:
points: Change of mind after successful activation
Dissatisfaction based on expected future services
Misunderstanding of membership benefits already disclosed before payment
Inactivity or non-usage of the platform
Failure to review platform policies before purchase
Suspension or termination due to policy violations

sections.heading: Additional Refund Eligibility Conditions
paragraphs: Certain membership plans may specifically mention whether they are refundable or non-refundable at the time of purchase. In cases where a membership plan is explicitly marked as refundable subject to applicable terms, users may request refunds in accordance with the conditions mentioned for that particular membership plan.

Where a membership plan is clearly identified as non-refundable at the time of purchase, users who voluntarily choose to purchase such membership shall generally not be entitled to claim refunds except in situations involving verified duplicate transactions, technical errors, unauthorized transactions, or circumstances otherwise required under applicable laws or platform policies.

sections.heading: Cancellation of Membership
paragraphs: Users may request cancellation of future membership renewals, if applicable, through the available support channels or account settings.
Cancellation of membership does not automatically guarantee a refund unless eligible under this policy.

sections.heading: Processing Timeline
paragraphs: Approved refunds, where applicable, are generally processed within a reasonable period depending on payment gateway processing timelines, banking procedures, and applicable financial regulations.
Actual credit timelines may vary depending on the payment method or financial institution involved.

sections.heading: Technical Errors
paragraphs: In the event of payment deduction without successful membership activation, users are advised to contact official support channels with relevant transaction details for review and resolution.

sections.heading: Fraud Prevention & Verification
paragraphs: The company reserves the right to request additional information, transaction proof, identity verification, or supporting documents before approving refund-related requests.
Refund requests involving suspicious, abusive, fraudulent, or unauthorized activities may be rejected and may lead to account restrictions where necessary.

sections.heading: Future Ecommerce Services
paragraphs: As ordering and ecommerce-related services will be introduced gradually in future platform versions, membership purchases should not be interpreted as guaranteed access to specific future services, product availability, or fixed commercial benefits.

sections.heading: Modification of Policy
paragraphs: Finfreedompreneurs Club Pvt. Ltd. reserves the right to modify, update, or revise this Refund & Cancellation Policy at any time without prior notice.

sections.heading: Contact & Support
paragraphs: For refund, cancellation, or payment-related assistance, users may contact the official support channels provided within the application.
By making payments through Superfowl Food Club, users acknowledge that they have read, understood, and agreed to this Refund & Cancellation Policy.
